import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Create a Document"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/user-documents/details/"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Upload a PDF document to your organisation.
Requires the `encrypted_reference_id` obtained from the **Get Organisation Reference ID** endpoint.

**Important:** Both `document_file` and `latest_document_file` must be provided. Send the same file for both fields.

The response returns `reference_id` (DOC_REF_ID) and `organization_document_encrypted_reference_id` (ORG_DOC_REF_ID), which are needed for subsequent API calls.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
